title: IPZ-385 Secret Female Investigator Rola Misaki - Rola Misaki (Laura Takizawa)
overview: A clear brain, a strong body, a strong mental power, and good looks! Female detective "Laura" who has all of them! I hunted down my father's drug trafficking organization one step further, but at the last minute I was caught in an enemy trap and arrested! Waiting for the captive female investigator was a number of cold and outrageous tortures of violent thugs! What is the fate of the sad female investigator "Laura" who screams and pant voices echoing in a closed room and turns into a horny tool for demons ...!
